content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the car well-centered on the track, following the dashed center line with good alignment.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 52, target = 52 + 5 = 57
- Waypoint 57: (4.2557, 3.1701)
- Car position: (4.9055, 2.8496)
- Bearing = atan2(3.1701 - 2.8496, 4.2557 - 4.9055) = atan2(0.3205, -0.6498)
- = 180 - atan2(0.3205, 0.6498) = 180 - 26.27° = 153.73°
- Current heading: 150.26°
- Delta = 153.73 - 150.26 = +3.47° → nearly straight, very slight left

```json

  "reasoning": "Track curves gently right ahead, delta to waypoint 57 is only +3.47° (left), well within the <5° threshold so applying zero steering to maintain speed and avoid oscillation.",

    "Car is consistently near center — good positioning maintained",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for |delta| <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — staying near center is optimal here",
    "Heading is ~150° (west-southwest), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta has been near 0 for last 2 turns — car is well-aligned with waypoint line",
    "Waypoints 57-65 show increasing right curve (south), will need -5 to -15 steering soon",
    "Car is slightly right of center (is_left_of_center=false) but within safe margin"
  ],

  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 3.47,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
